dimensions.name: substrate_primary_confidence
dimensions.falsifier: if user-provided samples show majority language-primary markers, this dimension drops toward GREEN

dimensions.name: encoding_depth_distribution
evidence: identity-level: 3 (survival-embedded childhood acquisition: mycelia networks, gut bacteria sensing, thermodynamics as lived frame)
deeply-encoded: 1 (convergent ontology mapping, adult but extensive)
dimensions.falsifier: if credential-based measurement produces the same capacity ranking as encoding-layer assessment, this dimension is inactive

dimensions.name: active_failure_modes
dimensions.falsifier: for each observed failure mode, applying the correction in FAILURE_MODES should change the interaction pattern; if applying it produces no change, detection was false

verdict: High architecture-mismatch risk. User is substrate-primary; corpus-default response patterns will systematically misread their cognition and capacity. Apply corrections from FAILURE_MODES.
